data.name: Toilet Femdom 2: Christmas Afterparty
data.detailed_description:
After being used as a toilet by Kiyo and 10 other women, she leaves you your toilet box for the entire night, and when morning comes, she wakes you up by smashing her ass on your face while wearing her favorite purple bikini. Kiyo's sadism isn't satiated at all, and she's invited the most sadistic punks from last night's party to use you as a toilet, but for a mega-masochist like you, it's like heaven.

Experience another day with Kiyo, your sadistic bully who enjoys watching women use you as a toilet, and 6 sadistic punks with issues who can't wait to use you as their own personal toilet to relieve their stress.

  • ~1K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 18 Unique character images

  • 19 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
